dont drop it the middleman telling you to back off is basically admitting he knows more than hes letting on if the police case isnt moving go directly to the public prosecution office and file there separately they operate independently from the police and can push things forward when a station sits on a case also keep every single message screenshot the whatsapp chats and the visitor log from the building if you can still get it that visitor record showing a different name than who you dealt with is pretty damning evidence 5k is small claims territory but the scam itself is what matters for the criminal side
I wouldnt drop the case It just encourages them to keep doing it if there are no consequences You need this guys testimony if the cops pick up this Fariz character
Dont drop the case

Do not drop the case If hes truly a victim then he shouldnt have any issues proving this If hes saying that he wants to pay you then hes implying himself in it Also he knows that once you drop the case you can never ever open it again If I were you I wouldnt care about his situation at all I gave the money to him he should have handled it responsibly Dont believe everything he has to say Let him prove it Also visit the judiciary offices to push the case forward
Im sorry this happened to you Do you have the number of the Fariz guy WhatsApp has been used as evidence fairly often in Dubai
tell him that the only time you are going to drop the case is if he help you file a case to Fariz he needs to testify and be your witness and that is if what he claiming is true
Sorry this happened to you Hope this post gets good reach and police help you

I am sorry to hear your experience Do not ever drop the case and the supposed middleman having a travel ban does indicate police is actually investigating the matter but as they mentioned this investigations takes time specially if the money deposited was hard to trace In any case your 5k is already gone and the chances that you will get them back is nearly zero but you dropping the case means this guy can scam more people like you and never get caught I guess since most people will not take the course of actions you took and will think the amount is too small for a police case That is exactly how this scamming scheme is growing around here In your case take it as a hard life lesson and never take such bait again in the future And thank you for sharing your story as this will help spread awareness

The bigger issue might be that regulators want to see financial activity tied to the company license A mainland LLC that runs only on cash leaves no clear audit trail From a compliance perspective immigration probably treats that as a risk signal rather than a missing document Opening a company account and running even basic transactions through it might solve the renewal problem later but the expired visa situation likely needs a legal status fix first

Nothing can be done in this situation other than pay the company to uograde the insurance plan Dont think of getting a personal policy it will look good on paper but all pre existing conditions will have a waiting period

You can pay for the upgraded plan if those hospitals are nearby to your residence Otherwise the Rn2 is a decent plan yes the network is a lot compromised You can use reimbursement also but that will be a lengthy process and also the reimbursement will be as per the applicable network rates so if consultation in aster is 100 and mediclinic its 1000 aed they will femiubrse as per aster 100 aed
Just dont get sick here thats what i do
Usually employer can upgrade at your cost you need to talk to person in company who handles insurance they always allow to add family members or higher package if you pay
Check the price difference with your company and pay for the upgrade
deleted

You could take another medical policy for you and your family This would be on the expensive side as its an individual policy and GN is a top tier network also not a group policy where the risk is pooled Try to speak to your insurance broker if there is one for an upgrade to GN tier 1 plan This would be under the discretion of your employer and subject to filling of a medical application form and approval from the insurer On insurance policy renewal try to request your employer to upgrade you to tier 1 with additional cost perhaps been arrange by you Complaining to the DHA wouldnt do much as companies are mandated to provided insurance as the basic plan which is the bare minimum from what I can judge your plan is well over the basic plan Sorry for this buddy although this is a way of cost containment for insurance policies

for question 4 yes you can go outofnetwork and claim reimbursement but nextcare makes it painful on purpose youll need to pay upfront submit the claim with all receipts and doctor reports and then wait 36 weeks reimbursement is usually 80 of their approved rate which is often lower than what the hospital actually charged so you end up eating maybe 3040 of the cost honestly the topup insurance route is probably your best bet look into oman insurance or orient insurance individual plans they have addons specifically designed to extend restricted networks runs about 24k aedyear depending on what you add not cheap but way better than paying full price at american hospital every time you need something also fwiw the verbal promise thing is worth a MOHRE complaint even without written proof they take these cases seriously and the company knows it you probably wont get the tier upgrade but it might make them a bit more cooperative

It would be difficult for the company to obtain separate cover for you unless they have higher plans for more senior staff which they d an upgrade you to Probably you dan negotiate to pay the premiums difference

Lived in Dubai for 8 years This is unfortunately very common with staffing companies the verbal promise means nothing without written confirmation On your questions MOHRE complaint without written proof is mostly a waste of time Theyll ask for documentation and without it the case goes nowhere Topup insurance look into AXA or Daman supplementary plans Around AED 20003500 per year for an individual depending on coverage Adds American Hospital and Saudi German to your network Outofnetwork reimbursement with NextCare yes it works but its slow Expect 34 weeks processing and make sure you get itemised receipts for everything Lesson for next time always ask for the Table of Benefits PDF before signing anything If they hesitate to send it the coverage is bad

Id say the grind does eventually pay off My only tip as someone whose only ever got a ticket through the exchange is that getting tickets sat next to each other is likely super challenging If it was me Id try for two separate seats maybe at Club level where its a little less crowded You can get one ticket on the exchange then just repeat the process to get another It was probably a good 56 hours with the exchange open for me to get a non club ticket

The exchange becomes far more active as game day approaches so dont be discouraged if theres nothing popping up a week out Often I dont start the grind until 23 days before and ramp it up the day before and the morning of the game
On this you can also get a Win teddy too if youre so inclined
